# defectdojo_notification_webhook (Resource)

DefectDojo Notification Webhook

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_notification_webhook" "example" {
  name = "Slack Security Alerts"
  url  = "https://hooks.slack.com/services/T00000000/B00000000/XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `header_name` (String) Name of the header required for interacting with the webhook endpoint.
- `header_value` (String, Sensitive) Content of the header required for interacting with the webhook endpoint.
- `name` (String) Name of the incoming webhook.
- `owner` (Number) Owner/receiver of notification. If empty, processed as system notification.
- `url` (String) The full URL of the incoming webhook.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier
- `status` (String) Status of the incoming webhook (read-only).
